name: Starter Battery
purpose: Provides electrical energy to start the engine and power the electrical accessories.

name: Spark Plug
purpose: Ignites the air-fuel mixture in the combustion chamber via electric spark.

name: Drive Chain
purpose: Transfers rotational power from the gearbox output shaft to the rear wheel.

name: Brake Pads
purpose: Clamps onto the brake disc to create friction and decelerate the motorcycle.

name: Brake Fluid
purpose: Transmits hydraulic force from master cylinder levers to calipers.

name: Tyres
purpose: Provides traction, absorbs road shock, and aids handling.

name: Carburetor
purpose: Mixes air and fuel in correct stoichiometric ratios for combustion.

name: Starter Motor
purpose: Cranks the crankshaft to initiate the internal combustion engine loop.
